past_challenges.raw: Junior year recruiting season was one of the most stressful periods of my life. I applied to over 60 internships, got rejected from most without even a response, and started questioning whether I was good enough for any of this.

I had no idea how to prepare for finance internship interviews — I didn't know about technical questions, case studies, or how much networking actually matters. I felt completely lost compared to people who had older siblings or alumni connections guiding them.
